Graph: graph-001
Flow: onboarding
Status: running
View: timeline

Nodes
  investigate [succeeded] risk=low
  implement [blocked] risk=high blocked_by=investigate
Actions
- open node: Enter/o
- view logs: l
- view dependencies: d
- explain decision: e
- launch/resume: r
- export mermaid/json: x
- switch view: v
CLI: asa graph visualize graph-001 --format mermaid

Events
Filter: all  Search: (none)  [live]
Keys: f filter  / search  p pause  x export  o open  e focus  ↑↓ select
CLI: asa runtime events --type <filter> --search <query> --export
  11:00:00  graph.generated
  11:01:00  graph.blocked
